tables: Rajasthan Staff Selection Board RSSB RSMSSB Librarian Grade III Recruitment 2025 Apply Online for 548 Post

Rajasthan Staff Selection Board RSSB RSMSSB has released the Librarian Grade III 2025 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this Rajasthan Librarian Grade III Recruitment 2025 Exam can Apply Online from 05 March 2025 to 03 April 2025. Read the notification for RSSSB Librarian Grade III 2025 Exam, eligibility, Subject Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information.
Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB)  | RSMSSB RSMSSB Rajasthan Librarian Grade III Recruitment 2025 Rajasthan Librarian Advt No. : 18/2024 :  Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM
Important Dates Application Begin : 05/03/2025 Last Date for Apply Online : 03/04/2025 Complete Form Last Date : 03/04/2025 Final Result Available : 15/07/2026

Application Fee General / OBC : 600/- OBC NCL : 400/- SC / ST : 400/- Correction Charge : 300/- This fee is for one time registration, now after paying the OTR fee once, the candidate will not have to pay the application fee again and again. Pay the Exam Fee Through Emitra CSC Center, Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking.

RSMSSB Librarian Grade III  Notification 2025 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2026 Minimum Age : 18 Years Maximum Age : 40 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per RSSB Librarian Grade III  548 Post Recruitment Exam 2025 Recruitment Rules .
Rajasthan RSSB Librarian Grade III  Recruitment 2025 : Vacancy Details Total : 548 Post
RSMSSB Rajasthan Librarian Grade III  Eligibility

Senior Secondary 10+2 with Certificate in Library Science / bachelor in Library & Information Science / Diploma in LIbrary & Information Science. More Details and Trade Wise Eligibility Read the Notification.

How to Fill : Rajasthan RSMSSB Librarian Grade III  Post Recruitment Online Form 2025 Rajasthan Staff Selection Board RSMSSB Librarian Grade III Recruitment 2025. Candidate Can Apply Between 05/03/2025 to 28 03/04/2025. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in RSMSSB Apply Online for Librarian Grade III  Vacancy 2025. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Rajasthan Driver Advt No : 18/2024 Notification  Before Apply Online.
